title: tragia balfouriana
intro: Tragia balfouriana, also known as the Balfour's spurge or Tragia, is a plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Tragia balfouriana include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help in reducing pain and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Tragia balfouriana is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
